strong_tokens: Encountered exception while building chunk meshes
RUBIDIUM_LAVA_FLUID_RENDER_CRASH.description: Rubidium FluidRenderer crashes with NPE during chunk mesh building, typically around lava blocks.
RUBIDIUM_LAVA_FLUID_RENDER_CRASH.recommendation: Replace or update Rubidium. Try Embeddium/Xenon if compatible.
RUBIDIUM_LAVA_FLUID_RENDER_CRASH.emergency_action: Skip only the unsafe lava fluid render operation for the affected chunk mesh.

DYNAMIC_FPS_BACKGROUND_FALSE_POSITIVE.description: Frame-time spike while window is unfocused due to intentional Dynamic FPS throttling.
DYNAMIC_FPS_BACKGROUND_FALSE_POSITIVE.recommendation: Not a real stutter. Classify as BACKGROUND_THROTTLING.
DYNAMIC_FPS_BACKGROUND_FALSE_POSITIVE.emergency_action: Classify as intentional background throttling instead of real stutter.

C2ME_CORRUPTED_CHUNK_CONTEXT.description: C2ME crash or hang mentioning chunk loading, corruption, or region file.
C2ME_CORRUPTED_CHUNK_CONTEXT.recommendation: Back up the world before changing C2ME recovery settings.

C2ME_WORLDGEN_DEADLOCK_CONTEXT.description: C2ME worker thread stuck on worldgen or chunk future.
C2ME_WORLDGEN_DEADLOCK_CONTEXT.recommendation: Test without C2ME or heavy worldgen datapacks.

DISTANT_HORIZONS_LOD_STUTTER_OR_CACHE_IO.display_name: Distant Horizons LOD Stutter or Cache I/O
DISTANT_HORIZONS_LOD_STUTTER_OR_CACHE_IO.description: Stutter during LOD generation or disk I/O spike while DH is active.
DISTANT_HORIZONS_LOD_STUTTER_OR_CACHE_IO.recommendation: Reduce LOD distance or pregen. Expected during initial LOD generation.

IRIS_OCULUS_SHADER_PIPELINE_CONTEXT.description: Freeze or crash during shader reload or compilation.
IRIS_OCULUS_SHADER_PIPELINE_CONTEXT.recommendation: Test with shaders disabled. Update Iris/Oculus and Sodium/Embeddium together.

EMBEDDIUM_OCULUS_TAINT_CONTEXT.description: Oculus has tainted the Embeddium renderer instance.
EMBEDDIUM_OCULUS_TAINT_CONTEXT.recommendation: Update both Embeddium and Oculus to compatible versions.

CHUNK_ANIMATOR_RENDERER_MIXIN_CONFLICT.description: Chunk Animator mixin injection into chunk renderer fails with Embeddium/Sodium/Oculus.
CHUNK_ANIMATOR_RENDERER_MIXIN_CONFLICT.recommendation: Remove Chunk Animator or update to a compatible version.

LIGHTING_ENGINE_OPTIMIZATION_CONTEXT.description: Lighting spike context with Starlight/ScalableLux/Phosphor installed.
LIGHTING_ENGINE_OPTIMIZATION_CONTEXT.recommendation: Expected during heavy block updates. Check for multiple lighting mods installed together.

GPU_BACKEND_RENDER_CONTEXT.description: GPU backend stutter or crash with Nvidium or VulkanMod.
GPU_BACKEND_RENDER_CONTEXT.recommendation: Check GPU driver version. Test without experimental GPU backend mod.

MODERNFIX_MEMORY_RESOURCE_CONTEXT.description: Startup freeze, resource reload, or memory context with ModernFix.
MODERNFIX_MEMORY_RESOURCE_CONTEXT.recommendation: Check ModernFix changelog for known issues with your mod set.

FERRITECORE_MEMORY_CONTEXT.description: Memory pressure context with FerriteCore installed.
FERRITECORE_MEMORY_CONTEXT.recommendation: Do not blame FerriteCore without strong evidence. Increase heap size.

LITHIUM_FAMILY_GAME_LOGIC_CONTEXT.description: Server tick spike in entity ticking, pathfinding, or block ticking with Lithium family.
LITHIUM_FAMILY_GAME_LOGIC_CONTEXT.recommendation: Use spark to identify the specific ticking hotspot.

CULLING_RENDER_CONTEXT.description: Entity/block entity rendering issue in culling context.
CULLING_RENDER_CONTEXT.recommendation: Check for entity count spike. Reduce entity render distance.
